Contacts.name: Company
Contacts.description: If yes, indicates this contact is not a person. Businesses, governments, schools and churches are examples of companies.

Contacts.name: Company_Name
Contacts.description: The full name of the company. This may be exactly the same as the Display Name of the company.

Contacts.name: Display_Name
Contacts.description: For Individuals: "Last_Name, Nickname" For Company: "Company_Name"

Contacts.name: Prefix_ID
Contacts.description: The title or salutation that applies to this individual used in formal greetings.

Contacts.name: First_Name
Contacts.description: The given name of the individual.

Contacts.name: Middle_Name
Contacts.description: The middle name of the individual.

Contacts.name: Last_Name
Contacts.description: The family name of the individual.

Contacts.name: Suffix_ID
Contacts.description: The term appended to this persons name to denote generation, education, etc.

Contacts.name: Nickname
Contacts.description: The name this individual prefers to be called.  This value should not be empty for individuals. It may be identical to First Name.

Contacts.name: Date_of_Birth
Contacts.description: The date when this individual escaped the womb.

Contacts.name: Gender_ID
Contacts.description: The sex of the individual.

Contacts.name: Marital_Status_ID
Contacts.description: A persons state of being single, married, separated, divorced, or widowed.

Contacts.name: Contact_Status_ID
Contacts.description: Indicates the over-all status of this contact with respect to the organization.

Contacts.name: Household_ID
Contacts.description: The primary physical residence and immediate family unit to which this contact belongs.

Contacts.name: Household_Position_ID
Contacts.description: The relationship between this individual and their primary household.

Contacts.name: Anniversary_Date
Contacts.description: The date when this contact was married to their current spouse.

Contacts.name: Date_of_Death
Contacts.description: The date when this individual departed from this world.

Contacts.name: Participant_Record
Contacts.description: The record in MinistryPlatform containing the participation history of this contact within this organization. Group, event, milestone, and response history is found in the participant record.

Contacts.name: Donor_Record
Contacts.description: The record in MinistryPlatform containing the donation history of this contact within this organization. Pledge history is also found in the donor record.

Contacts.name: Email_Address
Contacts.description: The email address used by all MinistryPlatform applications for communication with this contact.

Contacts.name: Mobile_Phone
Contacts.description: The primary cellular phone for this contact. This phone number is used for text messages sent by MinistryPlatform applications.

Contacts.name: Pager_Phone
Contacts.description: The telephone number for a small electronic device, capable of receiving short messages.

Contacts.name: Fax_Phone
Contacts.description: The telephone number associated with this contact to which facsimile documents can be sent.

Contacts.name: Facebook_Account
Contacts.description: A deprecated field which may optionally be used to store the address to the Facebook page for this contact.

Contacts.name: Twitter_Account
Contacts.description: A deprecated field which may optionally be used to store the address to the Twitter page for this contact.

Contacts.name: Web_Page
Contacts.description: The address on the World Wide Web to a page about this contact.

Contacts.name: Industry_ID
Contacts.description: The industry in which this contact is employed or for which this contact has been trained.

Contacts.name: Occupation_ID
Contacts.description: The job or position for which this contact has been trained or certified.

Contacts.name: Current_School
Contacts.description: The educational institution in which this contact is currently enrolled.

Contacts.name: HS_Graduation_Year
Contacts.description: The year when this contact completed High School.

Contacts.name: Email_Unlisted
Contacts.description: If yes, the Contact information visible in the Online Directory Widget will not contain the email address. Certain reports can optionally omit unlisted email addresses.

Contacts.name: Do_Not_Text
Contacts.description: Set this value to true when a contact expresses a desire to be left out of general or generic text/SMS communications sent to mobile phones.

Contacts.name: Mobile_Phone_Unlisted
Contacts.description: If yes, the Contact information visible in the Online Directory Widget will not contain the mobile phone number. Certain reports can optionally omit unlisted numbers.

Contacts.name: Remove_From_Directory
Contacts.description: If yes, the Contact record will not be visible in the Online Directory Widget, even if the record otherwise qualified to be included.

Contacts.name: User_Account
Contacts.description: The record containing the user information that allows this contact to authenticate into various MinistryPlatform applications.

Contacts.name: ID_Card
Contacts.description: A number which can be issued to this contact.  It is generally used to assist in identifying this contact via a barcode reader connected to a kiosk running the Check-in application.

Contacts.name: Contact_GUID
Contacts.description: A unique value automatically assigned to this contact by the MinistryPlatform database. This value may be used by some applications to identify this contact.

Contacts.name: _Contact_Setup_Date
Contacts.description: The date and time when this record was started. Often it is the date and time when it was first saved in MinistryPlatform.

Contact_Log.name: Contact_Date
Contact_Log.description: The date and time when the contact was made.

Contact_Log.name: Contact_Log_Type_ID
Contact_Log.description: The method used to contact this person.

Contact_Log.name: Made_By
Contact_Log.description: The person who made the contact.

Contact_Log.name: Notes
Contact_Log.description: Free-form text notes regarding this contact log entry.

Contact_Log.name: Planned_Contact_ID
Contact_Log.description: If applicable, the Planned Contact type related to this Contact Log entry used primarily with the Portal My Calls workflows.

Contact_Log.name: Contact_Successful
Contact_Log.description: A flag indicating if this contact attempt was successfully carried out.

Contact_Log.name: Original_Contact_Log_Entry
Contact_Log.description: A recursive and optional entry indicating that this contact log entry was a subsequent entry to a prior contact log entry. For example, the person may have requested a call back or the initial attempt may not have been successful.

Contact_Log.name: Feedback_Entry_ID
Contact_Log.description: This value will be populated automatically by MP Mobile to link a contact log entry to the prayer request the user was praying for when they added this contact log entry.

Contact_Log_Types.name: Contact_Log_Type
Contact_Log_Types.description: The name of the contact log type

Contact_Log_Types.name: Description
Contact_Log_Types.description: An explanation of the contact log type

Participants.name: Red_Flag_Notes
Participants.description: If populated, Red Flag Notes will be clearly displayed as a Record Fact wherever configured.

Participants.name: Contact_ID
Participants.description: The participant record is an extension of the contact record. It would be unusual to edit this field.

Participants.name: Participant_Type_ID
Participants.description: The values in this church-defined list reflect how individuals can be related to the church.

Participants.name: Member_Status_ID
Participants.description: The status of this participant with respect to their membership in this organization.

Participants.name: Participant_Engagement_ID
Participants.description: An automatically updated value that tells us to what degree someone is engaged.

Participants.name: Participant_Start_Date
Participants.description: Input the date when this person started participating at the church in ANY way.

Participants.name: Participant_End_Date
Participants.description: The date when this person ceased participating in the church. In most cases a record with a value in this field should have an inactive or deceased contact status.

Participants.name: Notes
Participants.description: Information about this participant that does not belong in any of the sub pages, but would help inform someone about how or why this person participates at the church.

Participants.name: _First_Attendance_Ever
Participants.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the first date when this person attended any event at the church.

Participants.name: _Second_Attendance_Ever
Participants.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the second date when this person attended any event at the church.

Participants.name: _Third_Attendance_Ever
Participants.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the third date when this person attended any event at the church.

Participants.name: _Last_Attendance_Ever
Participants.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the most recent date when this person attended any event at the church.

Participants.name: _Background_Check_Type
Participants.description: The name of the last background check package selected for this individual. Manual is the default if no package is used.

Participants.name: _Background_Check_Status
Participants.description: The status of the last background check based on the value for the All Clear field and how much time has elapsed since Background Check Returned.

Participants.name: _Background_Check_Date
Participants.description: The date the last background check was returned, or if incomplete, when it was started.

Participants.name: __Recent_Events
Participants.description: People with attendance in the past 90 days (based on event participant records) with Event Types included (Omit = False). As for the Events and attendance, it is ANY event with 02 Registered, 03 Attended, or 04 Confirmed in the past 90 days.

Participants.name: __In_Group_Life
Participants.description: People who are currently active in the group (no end date on the group participant record) with Group Types included (Omit = False).

Participants.name: __Is_Leading
Participants.description: People who are currently active in the group (null or future end date on the group participant record) and has a Group Role Type of Leader.

Participants.name: Church_of_Record
Participants.description: Church where the participant was Baptized.

Participants.name: Baptism_Parish_Name
Participants.description: Use in lieu of Church of Record to store a text value for baptism parish name.

Participants.name: Baptism_Parish_Address
Participants.description: Use in lieu of Church of Record to store a text value for baptism parish address.

Participants.name: Birth_Certificate_Address
Participants.description: Street Address listing where the participant was born.

Participants.name: Birth_Certificate_City
Participants.description: City listing where the participant was born.

Participants.name: Birth_Certificate_State
Participants.description: State listing where the participant was born.

Participant_Milestones.name: Participant_ID
Participant_Milestones.description: The ID of the participant who is being assigned the milestone.

Participant_Milestones.name: Milestone_ID
Participant_Milestones.description: The ID of the milestone that is being associated with the participant.

Participant_Milestones.name: Program_ID
Participant_Milestones.description: The program (ministry effort) responsible for the assignment and follow up of this milestone.

Participant_Milestones.name: Date_Accomplished
Participant_Milestones.description: The Date the Milestone was accomplished.

Participant_Milestones.name: Event_ID
Participant_Milestones.description: The ID of the event where the milestone was achieved.

Participant_Milestones.name: Witness
Participant_Milestones.description: The contact record of the person who witnessed this milestone.

Participant_Milestones.name: At_Prior_Church
Participant_Milestones.description: Was this Milestone accomplished at a prior church?

Participant_Milestones.name: Notes
Participant_Milestones.description: Notes about how the Milestone was accomplished.

Participant_Milestones.name: Followed_Up
Participant_Milestones.description: Was this person followed up with?

Participant_Milestones.name: Discontinue_Journey
Participant_Milestones.description: When true, this Milestone is no longer actively used and will be hidden in the default drop down lists or views.

Participant_Milestones.name: Performed_By
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the celebrant.

Participant_Milestones.name: Place
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the place the Sacrament was received.

Participant_Milestones.name: Sacramental_Name
Participant_Milestones.description: The name given to them when they received the Sacrament.

Participant_Milestones.name: Received
Participant_Milestones.description: If yes, indicates this Sacrament has been received.

Participant_Milestones.name: Registry_Volume
Participant_Milestones.description: The Registry Volume where this Sacrament is recorded.

Participant_Milestones.name: Registry_Page
Participant_Milestones.description: The page in the Registry Volume where this Sacrament is recorded.

Participant_Milestones.name: Registry_Number
Participant_Milestones.description: The number in the Registry Volume where this Sacrament is recorded.

Participant_Milestones.name: Witness_1
Participant_Milestones.description: This is where you record the first witness.

Participant_Milestones.name: Witness_2
Participant_Milestones.description: This is where you record the second witness.

Participant_Milestones.name: Person_1
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the Sponsor, God Parent, Matron of Honor, or Best Man.

Participant_Milestones.name: Person_2
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the Sponsor, God Parent, Matron of Honor, or Best Man.

Participant_Milestones.name: Mother_Name
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the Mother's current name.

Participant_Milestones.name: Mother_Maiden_Name
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the Mother's maiden name.

Participant_Milestones.name: Mother_Religion
Participant_Milestones.description: Indicate the Mother's religion.

Participant_Milestones.name: Father_Name
Participant_Milestones.description: This is the Father's name.

Participant_Milestones.name: Father_Religion
Participant_Milestones.description: Indicate the Father's religion.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Name
Participant_Milestones.description: The full name of the Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for Spouse's baptism.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism_Church
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for baptism church name as relates to Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism_Street
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for baptism street address as relates to Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism_City
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for baptism city as relates to Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism_State
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for baptism state as relates to Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Baptism_Zip
Participant_Milestones.description: A text value for baptism zip as relates to Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Parent_1
Participant_Milestones.description: Indicate the first parent of Spouse.

Participant_Milestones.name: Spouse_Parent_2
Participant_Milestones.description: Indicate the second parent of Spouse.

Participant_Certifications.name: Participant_ID
Participant_Certifications.description: The Participant record of the volunteer completing the Certification.

Participant_Certifications.name: Certification_Submitted
Participant_Certifications.description: The date this Certification was submitted to the Provider.

Participant_Certifications.name: Certification_Completed
Participant_Certifications.description: The date this Certification was completed. Set by the Certification Provider upon completion.

Participant_Certifications.name: Passed
Participant_Certifications.description: A flag indicating whether this Participant has passed the Certification.

Participant_Certifications.name: Certification_Expires
Participant_Certifications.description: The date this Certification expires. Set by a nightly routine based on the Certification Type. You may manually set a date if an exception is necessary for a particular participant’s Certification.

Participant_Certifications.name: Certification_GUID
Participant_Certifications.description: The unique identifier used to identify this Participant Certification with the Certification Provider.

Participant_Certifications.name: Notes
Participant_Certifications.description: Free-form notes possibly provided by the Certification Provider (e.g., URL to certificate).

Member_Statuses.name: Member_Status
Member_Statuses.description: The status of this participant with respect to their membership in this organization.

Member_Statuses.name: Can_Access_Directory
Member_Statuses.description: If yes, Participants with this Member Status can access the Directory (Note: The assigned Participant Type must also allow access).

Member_Statuses.name: Show_In_Directory
Member_Statuses.description: If yes, Participants with this Member Status will show in the Directory unless the Contact has chosen to be removed from the Directory.

Groups.name: Group_Name
Groups.description: The friendly name that will describe this group on the public group finder.

Groups.name: Group_Type_ID
Groups.description: The group type will determine how this group is presented in various tools availble to the public.

Groups.name: Ministry_ID
Groups.description: The ministry that is responsible for this group or team.

Groups.name: Congregation_ID
Groups.description: The congregation to which this specific team is assigned or where the majority of group members worship.

Groups.name: Primary_Contact
Groups.description: The person who will be resonsible for communication to this group.

Groups.name: Description
Groups.description: Detail the purpose of this group and who might want to join. This information will appear on the public group finder.

Groups.name: Start_Date
Groups.description: The approximate date when this group came into existence.

Groups.name: End_Date
Groups.description: The approximate date when this group ceased to meet or came to an end. Group Participant End Dates are automatically assigned if they don't already have an End Date.

Groups.name: Target_Size
Groups.description: The desired number of members for this group.  Once exceeded, this group will no longer appear on the public group finder.

Groups.name: Parent_Group
Groups.description: The group to which this group reports.

Groups.name: Priority_ID
Groups.description: The primary priority of the church that this group exists to meet.

Groups.name: Offsite_Meeting_Address
Groups.description: The location where most group meetings take place.

Groups.name: Group_Is_Full
Groups.description: A group that is full is no longer accepting new participants. When true, this group will not appear on the group finder.

Groups.name: Available_Online
Groups.description: This field controls whether this group is available on the Portals Group Finder and MyGroups page as well as the Group Manager on Mobile Tools.

Groups.name: Meets_Online
Groups.description: If true, this Group will show as meets online on the Group Finder and Details Widgets.

Groups.name: Life_Stage_ID
Groups.description: Visitors to the public portal who use the group finder will be able to search for a group based upon the values in this list which typically describe the age, employment, or marital status of those who are likely to participate in this group.

Groups.name: Group_Focus_ID
Groups.description: Visitors to the public portal who use the group finder will be able to search for a group based upon the values in this list which typically describe the topics covered when this group meets.

Groups.name: Meeting_Time
Groups.description: Select the time this Group normally meets based on the time zone of the Congregation. Required if you set "Create Next Meeting" to True.

Groups.name: Meeting_Day_ID
Groups.description: Select the day of the week this Group normally meets. Required if you set “Create Next Meeting” to True.

Groups.name: Meeting_Frequency_ID
Groups.description: Select how often the Group meets. The Group Attendance routine only supports weekly frequencies. If blank and “Create Next Meeting” is True, the routine assumes the Group meets weekly.

Groups.name: Meeting_Duration_ID
Groups.description: Select the normal length of Group meetings. If blank and “Create Next Meeting” is True, the Group Attendance routine assumes the Group meetings last 60 minutes.

Groups.name: Required_Book
Groups.description: The value selected from this list identifies the book this group is studying together.

Groups.name: Descended_From
Groups.description: The group that multiplied to start this group.

Groups.name: Reason_Ended
Groups.description: The value selected from this list describes the reason this group no longer meets. If this value is populated the End Date should be as well.

Groups.name: _Last_Attendance_Posted
Groups.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the last date when attendance was posted for this group.

Groups.name: _Last_Group_Member_Changed
Groups.description: A read only field updated by a nightly routine indicating the last date when a member of this group was changed, added, or end-dated.

Groups.name: Secure_Check-in
Groups.description: When set to true, Participants who check into this group will be issued secured name tags.

Groups.name: Suppress_Nametag
Groups.description: When set to true, individuals who are issued secured name tags will only get two security tags instead of three.

Groups.name: Suppress_Care_Note
Groups.description: The Care Note prompt works for secure groups when enabled by a configuration setting. This field allows it to be suppressed if needed for this group.

Groups.name: On_Classroom_Manager
Groups.description: When this value is true, leaders will be able to manage this group from the Classroom Manager application which allows for a heads up display, attendance taking, and much more.

Groups.name: Promote_to_Group
Groups.description: The group to which the participants of this group will move once they age out, or graduate out, of this group.

Groups.name: Age_in_Months_to_Promote
Groups.description: The value in this field defines the number of months of age a participant must reach to be automatically moved by a nightly routine to the group set in the Promote to Group field.

Groups.name: Promote_Weekly
Groups.description: When true, this group will automatically promote members to the "Promote To Group" when they reach the "Age in Months to Promote" value.

Groups.name: Promotion_Date
Groups.description: The future date when all individuals in this group should be promoted. Will happen only if Promote_to_Group is populated and Promote_Weekly is not.

Groups.name: Promote_Participants_Only
Groups.description: If Promotion_Date is set and this value is true, then on the promotion date only participants will be promoted. Servants and Leaders will not.

Groups.name: Send_Attendance_Notification
Groups.description: When True, the contact person of this Group will receive an email reminder to post attendance for this Group after each scheduled meeting.

Groups.name: Send_Service_Notification
Groups.description: When set to true, the servants and leaders within this group will be sent an email weekly reminding them of upcoming events where this group is scheduled.

Groups.name: Enable_Discussion
Groups.description: Deprecated, no longer in use.

Groups.name: SMS_Number
Groups.description: The SMS Number that this Group can use to send outgoing text messages from GroupLife.

Groups.name: Default_Meeting_Room
Groups.description: The Room used for regular Group meetings. Used to create the next scheduled meeting.

Groups.name: Create_Next_Meeting
Groups.description: If true, a nightly routine will create the next meeting and advance the Next Schedule Meeting date automatically. Set to False to stop or pause the routine from creating Events.

Groups.name: Next_Scheduled_Meeting
Groups.description: The date of the next event into which this group is scheduled. You may manually add a future date and a nightly routine will create the event if it doesn't exist. If the value is in the past and Create Next Meeting is true, a nightly routine will advance this date and create the very next Event based on Meeting Day, Frequency, and Duration.

Groups.name: Available_On_App
Groups.description: PocketPlatform Only: Allow this group to use Group Management features in PocketPlatform.

Group_Participants.name: Group_ID
Group_Participants.description: The group this participant is associated with.

Group_Participants.name: Participant_ID
Group_Participants.description: The participant associated with this group.

Group_Participants.name: Group_Role_ID
Group_Participants.description: The group role this participant has within the group.

Group_Participants.name: Start_Date
Group_Participants.description: The date the participant joined the group.

Group_Participants.name: End_Date
Group_Participants.description: The date the participant stopped participating in the group.

Group_Participants.name: Employee_Role
Group_Participants.description: If yes, the group participant is an employee.

Group_Participants.name: Hours_Per_Week
Group_Participants.description: The hours per week the participant will be involved in this group.

Group_Participants.name: Notes
Group_Participants.description: Notes associated with this group participant.

Group_Participants.name: Need_Book
Group_Participants.description: Whether or not this group requires a book.

Group_Participants.name: Email_Opt_Out
Group_Participants.description: Whether or not this person has opted out of email for this group.

Group_Participants.name: Auto_Promote
Group_Participants.description: If this group is subject to automatic promotion, set this value to false so that this group participant will be left in the group. This value should generally be true even if the group is not subject to auto promotion.

Group_Participants.name: _First_Attendance
Group_Participants.description: The first time event attendance was logged for this group participant.

Group_Participants.name: _Second_Attendance
Group_Participants.description: The second time event attendance was logged for this group participant.

Group_Participants.name: _Third_Attendance
Group_Participants.description: The third time event attendance was logged for this group participant.

Group_Participants.name: _Last_Attendance
Group_Participants.description: The most recent time event attendance was logged for this group participant.

Group_Participants.name: Show_Email
Group_Participants.description: PocketPlatform Only: Show participant's email address to other group participants within Group Management features in PocketPlatform.

Group_Participants.name: Show_Phone
Group_Participants.description: PocketPlatform Only: Show participant's mobile phone to other group participants within Group Management features in PocketPlatform.

Group_Participants.name: Show_Last_Name
Group_Participants.description: PocketPlatform Only: Show participant's last name to other group participants within Group Management features in PocketPlatform.

Group_Participants.name: Show_Photo
Group_Participants.description: PocketPlatform Only: Show participant's photo to other group participants within Group Management features in PocketPlatform.

Group_Participants.name: __Cleanup_Wait_Count
Group_Participants.description: Do not modify. Used to clean up abandoned Group_Participants

Group_Types.name: Group_Type
Group_Types.description: The name of the group type

Group_Types.name: Description
Group_Types.description: An explanation of the group type

Group_Types.name: Default_Role
Group_Types.description: The default role, used by various applications when adding new members to groups of this type.

Group_Types.name: Activity_Log_Start_Date
Group_Types.description: If set to yes/true the activity will log a current member of these groups with the date they joined the group instead of todays date.

Group_Types.name: Show_On_Group_Finder
Group_Types.description: If set to yes, groups of this type can be set to be visible on the Group Finder.

Group_Types.name: Omit_From_Engagement_Group_Life
Group_Types.description: If false, Groups with this Group Type will be included in the Participant Engagement routine.

Group_Roles.name: Role_Title
Group_Roles.description: The title of the Group role, appears in reports and as a token in Checkin.

Group_Roles.name: Description
Group_Roles.description: An explanation of the group role

Group_Roles.name: Group_Role_Type_ID
Group_Roles.description: The name of the group role type

Group_Roles.name: Group_Role_Direction_ID
Group_Roles.description: Internal informational field to determine if this role is focused outside the church or within the church.

Group_Roles.name: Group_Role_Intensity_ID
Group_Roles.description: Internal informational field to quantify the commitment this role takes to fulfill.

Group_Roles.name: Ministry_ID
Group_Roles.description: This role is specific to a ministry.

Group_Roles.name: Background_Check_Required
Group_Roles.description: If someone has this role, they need to have a current background check on file. This field will affect various views and reports in regards to who needs background checks.

Group_Roles.name: Omit_From_Portal
Group_Roles.description: Determines if this role will appear in various drop-downs on the portal. Specifically, the roles available to a group leader when placing someone in their group.

Group_Roles.name: Manages_Volunteers
Group_Roles.description: If this field is set to true, all individuals with this Group Role will have access to Compliance Alerts and can accept new Applicants in GroupLife.

Group_Role_Types.name: Group_Role_Type
Group_Role_Types.description: The name of the group role type

Group_Role_Types.name: Description
Group_Role_Types.description: An explanation of the group role type

Events.name: Event_Title
Events.description: The friendly name that will describe this event on the calendar.

Events.name: Event_Type_ID
Events.description: A church-specific list used to categorize or group events.

Events.name: Congregation_ID
Events.description: The unit within the organization that is expected to participate in this event. This may be a language group, venue, or campus.

Events.name: Location_ID
Events.description: The physical place where the event will take place.

Events.name: Meeting_Instructions
Events.description: Information the participants in this event will need in order to participate in the event.

Events.name: Description
Events.description: A brief paragraph further explaining the purpose of the event. Promotional text about the event goes here.

Events.name: Program_ID
Events.description: The ongoing ministry effort of which this Event is a part. The ministry department overseeing the event is sourced from the Program.

Events.name: Primary_Contact
Events.description: The person responsible for planning this event and answering questions about it.

Events.name: Participants_Expected
Events.description: The number of people expected at this Event. Also, the maximum number of people who can register for this Event. If some are attending online and others physically, number should only include those physically attending.

Events.name: Minutes_for_Setup
Events.description: The number of minutes before this event during which rooms and equipment must be reserved.

Events.name: Event_Start_Date
Events.description: The date and time when this event will begin.

Events.name: Event_End_Date
Events.description: The date and time when this event will end.

Events.name: Minutes_for_Cleanup
Events.description: The number of minutes after this event during which rooms and equipment must remain reserved.

Events.name: Cancelled
Events.description: An indication that a previously scheduled event must remain on the calendar, but should be marked as cancelled which will automatically release reserved rooms and equipment.

Events.name: _Approved
Events.description: An indication as to whether the approval process has been completed for the event. Events will not appear on the public calendar until approved.

Events.name: Visibility_Level_ID
Events.description: An indication of the audience for which the event is intended. Public events will appear on the public calendar.

Events.name: Featured_On_Calendar
Events.description: An indication that this event is special or warrants promotion. It is not part of regular weekly programming and should be easily highlighted to the public.

Events.name: Online_Registration_Product
Events.description: The product associated with the event which is required for online registration and controls the cost and cost-related options for registration. Required even if event is free or no cost.

Events.name: Registration_Form
Events.description: A custom form allowing the church to capture additional, non-financial information about the person as they register for the event.

Events.name: Registration_Start
Events.description: The date and time when registration for this event can begin. Leave blank if individuals can begin to register as soon as the event is visible on the public calendar.

Events.name: Registration_End
Events.description: The date and time when registration for this event will close automatically. Leave blank if individuals can register up till the beginning of the event.

Events.name: Registration_Active
Events.description: An on/off switch for online registrations. It will automatically be set to off when registrations reach the value in Participants Expected.

Events.name: Register_Into_Series
Events.description: If set to true, the registrants will be added to future events in this event series automatically.

Events.name: External_Registration_URL
Events.description: An optional URL to a registration form in a third party application which will facilitate event registrations. The third party application may or may not be integrated with MinistryPlatform.

Events.name: _Web_Approved
Events.description: An additional approval flag controlling whether an event is visible on the public calendar.

Events.name: Force_Login
Events.description: When set to true, this event will require users to login before registering.

Events.name: Allow_Check-in
Events.description: An indication as to whether this event will be added to the scope of the check-in application.

Events.name: Ignore_Program_Groups
Events.description: An indication as to whether this event will have the groups associated with the parent program in scope for check-in.  When true, only people in groups and registrants of the event can check in.

Events.name: Prohibit_Guests
Events.description: This field has been deprecated.

Events.name: Early_Check-in_Period
Events.description: The number of minutes before the event start time when individuals can check themselves in at an unattended station. Leave blank if the default value of 60 minutes is acceptable.

Events.name: Late_Check-in_Period
Events.description: The number of minutes after the event start time when individuals can check themselves in at an unattended station. Leave blank if the default value of 30 minutes is acceptable.

Events.name: Registrant_Message
Events.description: Create a new Template and set it here.  A Message will be sent to each registrant using the appropriate template. This runs every 15 minutes.

Events.name: Days_Out_to_Remind
Events.description: Set the number of days before this event when registrants should be reminded about the event.

Events.name: Optional_Reminder_Message
Events.description: If a special reminder Template is created for this Event, set it here. If there is a value in Days out to Remind, the template will be sent as a Message to all Registered individuals. This runs every night.

Events.name: Attendee_Message
Events.description: Create a Template and associate it here. A message using that Template will be sent after the event ends to those who have a participation status of attended or confirmed. This runs every 15 minutes.

Events.name: Send_To_Heads
Events.description: If set to true, the registrant and all of the Heads of Household and Non-Custodials will be sent an email.

Events.name: Parent_Event_ID
Events.description: A deprecated field that is ignored by all Think Ministry applications. It allows an event to be associated with another event. It is not related to events in a series.

Events.name: Priority_ID
Events.description: The defined priority of this organization that justifies this event. The primary purpose of this event.

Events.name: On_Connection_Card
Events.description: An indication as to whether the event will be available to users of the Connection Card Tool.

Events.name: On_Donation_Batch_Tool
Events.description: An indication as to whether the event will be available to users of the Donation Batch Tool.

Events.name: Project_Code
Events.description: The project code is typically used for integration or reporting for your accounting system.

Events.name: __Reservation_Start
Events.description: A computed and hidden field which indicates the starting date and time when resources associated with this event are booked.

Events.name: __Reservation_End
Events.description: A computed, hidden field which indicates the ending date and time when resources associated with this event are booked.

Events.name: Online_Meeting_Link
Events.description: A link to an online conference call that this Event will use, currently visible to Group Leaders via GroupLife.

Events.name: Read_More_URL
Events.description: PocketPlatform Only: Use this field to show an extra button on the Event Detail screen that opens the specified URL in the device browser.

Events.name: Allow_Self_Checkin
Events.description: PocketPlatform Only: Allow users to use Self Checkin feature to mark themselves as attending this event.

Events.name: Minor_Registration
Events.description: If true, Date of Birth will be required and registration labels will clarify Parent/Guardian vs Attendee during registration.

Events.name: Allow_Email
Events.description: If true, the individual listed as the Event Contact can be emailed directly via the Event Details widget. Note: this provides the ability for ANYONE to contact that individual, so use with caution!

Events.name: Show_Building_Room_Info
Events.description: If true, Building and Room information will be visible on the Event Details widget.

Event_Participants.name: Event_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Event the participant is associated with.

Event_Participants.name: Participant_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Participant associated with this event.

Event_Participants.name: Participation_Status_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Participation Status of this event participant.

Event_Participants.name: Time_In
Event_Participants.description: The time this participant checked into the event.

Event_Participants.name: Time_Confirmed
Event_Participants.description: The time this participants attendance was confirmed.

Event_Participants.name: Time_Out
Event_Participants.description: The time this participant checked-out of the event.

Event_Participants.name: Notes
Event_Participants.description: Notes associated with this event participant; if registered online, registration-related notes appear here.

Event_Participants.name: Group_Participant_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Group Participant this event participant is associated with.

Event_Participants.name: Check-in_Station
Event_Participants.description: The check-in station this event participant used.

Event_Participants.name: _Setup_Date
Event_Participants.description: Date the Participant registered for the Event.

Event_Participants.name: Group_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Group this event participant is associated with.

Event_Participants.name: Room_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Room this participants group is associated with.

Event_Participants.name: Call_Parents
Event_Participants.description: A field available to be used in custom development of the Call Parents functionality in Classroom Manager.

Event_Participants.name: Group_Role_ID
Event_Participants.description: The Group Role this event participant has.

Event_Participants.name: Response_ID
Event_Participants.description: If applicable, the Response record of the Opportunity that was configured to Add to Event those that responded.

Event_Participants.name: Registrant_Message_Sent
Event_Participants.description: Bit field to track if the Registrant Notification email was sent. (Routine runs every 15 minutes.)

Event_Participants.name: Attendee_Message_Sent
Event_Participants.description: Bit field to track if the Attendee Notification email was sent. (Routine runs every 15 minutes.)

Event_Participants.name: Attending_Online
Event_Participants.description: If true, this Participant will not be physically present at the Event, but attending virtually. Set manually or based on Option Price selection.

Event_Metrics.name: Event_ID
Event_Metrics.description: The Event this metric is for.

Event_Metrics.name: Metric_ID
Event_Metrics.description: The metric recorded for this Event.

Event_Metrics.name: Numerical_Value
Event_Metrics.description: The number value of this metric.

Event_Metrics.name: Group_ID
Event_Metrics.description: The Group associated with this event metric.

Event_Rooms.name: Event_ID
Event_Rooms.description: The Event associated with this room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: Room_ID
Event_Rooms.description: The Room this reservation is for.

Event_Rooms.name: Group_ID
Event_Rooms.description: The Group that will be using this Room for this Event.

Event_Rooms.name: Default_Group_Room
Event_Rooms.description: The default room for this Group.

Event_Rooms.name: Balance_Priority
Event_Rooms.description: For balancing Participants between Rooms. If none, set to 0. To fill one completely, then fill other: set first to 0, then other to 1. To fill evenly, back and forth: set both as 0.

Event_Rooms.name: Closed
Event_Rooms.description: If yes, the Room will not be available for Participants to check into regardless of other settings.

Event_Rooms.name: Auto_Close_At_Capacity
Event_Rooms.description: If true, the Room will automatically be set to Closed = True when the Max Capacity set on the Room record is met by the number of participants checked in.

Event_Rooms.name: Room_Layout_ID
Event_Rooms.description: The Room Layout associated with this room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: Chairs
Event_Rooms.description: The number of chairs needed for this events room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: Tables
Event_Rooms.description: The number of tables needed for this events room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: Notes
Event_Rooms.description: Notes for this events room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: _Approved
Event_Rooms.description: The approval status of this room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: Cancelled
Event_Rooms.description: The cancellation status of this room reservation.

Event_Rooms.name: __Primary_Reservation
Event_Rooms.description: This flag will help reports and views to determine which reservation to pull first in order to accommodate multiple groups sharing a room or multiple rooms associated with one event.

Rooms.name: Room_Name
Rooms.description: The friendly name for this room.

Rooms.name: Room_Number
Rooms.description: The room number associated with this room.

Rooms.name: Building_ID
Rooms.description: The building this room is located in.

Rooms.name: Description
Rooms.description: A brief description of the room.

Rooms.name: Maximum_Capacity
Rooms.description: The maximum number of people the room can safely accommodate.

Rooms.name: Default_Room_Layout
Rooms.description: The standard layout for this room if no other request is made.

Rooms.name: Room_Usage_Type_ID
Rooms.description: The type of room this space is or the type of use this room is for.

Rooms.name: Bookable
Rooms.description: If yes, the room is available for reservations.

Rooms.name: Last_Remodel_Date
Rooms.description: The last time the room was remodeled.

Rooms.name: Parent_Room_ID
Rooms.description: The larger room this smaller room is "under" or a part of.

Rooms.name: Auto_Approve
Rooms.description: If yes, a reservation for this room skips the approval process.

Rooms.name: Print_Server_ID
Rooms.description: The server that is managing printing for Check-In Suite.

Rooms.name: Printer_Name
Rooms.description: The Printer that should print this rooms labels. Updated via Check-in Suite.

Room_Layouts.name: Layout_Name
Room_Layouts.description: The name of the room layout.

Room_Layouts.name: Description
Room_Layouts.description: A description of the room layout.

Room_Layouts.name: Capacity
Room_Layouts.description: The person capacity for this room layout.

Room_Layouts.name: Table_Count
Room_Layouts.description: The number of tables this room layout allows.

Room_Layouts.name: Chair_Count
Room_Layouts.description: The number of chairs this room layout allows.

Room_Layouts.name: Setup_Minutes
Room_Layouts.description: The number of minutes needed for this room layout.

Room_Layouts.name: Room_ID
Room_Layouts.description: The room associated with this room layout.

Programs.name: Program_Name
Programs.description: Name of the Program representing an ongoing ministry effort.

Programs.name: Congregation_ID
Programs.description: The Congregation where this Program takes place.

Programs.name: Ministry_ID
Programs.description: The department that is responsible to oversee this Program.

Programs.name: Start_Date
Programs.description: The date the Program began.

Programs.name: End_Date
Programs.description: The date the Program ended.

Programs.name: Program_Type_ID
Programs.description: An internal informational field indicating the main purpose of the Program.

Programs.name: Leadership_Team
Programs.description: An internal informational field indicating the main group that oversees this Program.

Programs.name: Primary_Contact
Programs.description: The Contact who oversees this Program.

Programs.name: Priority_ID
Programs.description: An internal informational field indicating the primary purpose this Program exists to further.

Programs.name: On_Connection_Card
Programs.description: If yes, Milestones, Responses and Feedback assigned to this Program can be edited via the Connection Card Tool.

Programs.name: Tax_Deductible_Donations
Programs.description: Donations can be distributed to any program, but only donations to programs with a yes in this field will appear on a donors statement.

Programs.name: Statement_Title
Programs.description: This name will appear on the online giving page and on the donor statement.  Keep it short!

Programs.name: Statement_Header_ID
Programs.description: Indicates the column this program will be listed under for donor statements and other donation reports.  If empty donations to this program will be under the other column.

Programs.name: Allow_Online_Giving
Programs.description: Selecting Yes will allow donors to give online to this program IF it is of type stewardship.

Programs.name: Online_Sort_Order
Programs.description: This sort order will ensure that the online designations for giving appear in the order desired.

Programs.name: Pledge_Campaign_ID
Programs.description: The campaign currently associated with donations to this program

Programs.name: Account_Number
Programs.description: This number will be used to generate a GL export summarizing the income account donations posted to this program should be credited against.

Programs.name: Default_Target_Event
Programs.description: The Event the Donation Distributions automatically assign to when selected Donations are Batched or selected Batches are Deposited.

Programs.name: On_Donation_Batch_Tool
Programs.description: If yes, Donations can be distributed to this Program when processing donations through Batch Manager Tool.

Programs.name: Available_Online
Programs.description: This field is deprecated.

Programs.name: Omit_From_Engagement_Giving
Programs.description: If false, donations to this Program will be included in the Participant Engagement routine.

Programs.name: SMS_Number
Programs.description: The SMS Number that this Program can use to send outgoing text messages from LifeApps.

Programs.name: OLG_Fund
Programs.description: PocketPlatform Only: The OLG Fund name that corresponds to this Program for OLG Donations.

Programs.name: OLG_Sub_Fund
Programs.description: PocketPlatform Only: The OLG Sub Fund name (if applicable) that corresponds to this Program for OLG Donations.

Programs.name: Vision2_Program_ID
Programs.description: PocketPlatform Only: The Vision 2 ID that corresponds to this Program for Vision 2 Donations.

Background_Checks.name: Contact_ID
Background_Checks.description: The contact record of the person undergoing the background check.

Background_Checks.name: Requesting_Ministry
Background_Checks.description: An optional field designating the ministry department that requested that this person undergo a background check.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Submitted
Background_Checks.description: The date when this background check was submitted to the service provider.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Returned
Background_Checks.description: The date when the background check provider returned the completed background check about this contact.

Background_Checks.name: All_Clear
Background_Checks.description: A flag indicating whether this contact was cleared by this background check.

Background_Checks.name: Notes
Background_Checks.description: Free-form notes about this background check can be stored here.

Background_Checks.name: Theft
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history of theft.

Background_Checks.name: Drugs
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history with drugs.

Background_Checks.name: Sexual
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history of sexual misconduct.

Background_Checks.name: DUI
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history of driving under the influence.

Background_Checks.name: Battery
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history of physical altercations.

Background_Checks.name: Traffic
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history of traffic violations.

Background_Checks.name: Other
Background_Checks.description: Set to true if this background check indicated the individual had a prior history involving other infractions not explicitly listed on the background check form.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Started
Background_Checks.description: The date the background check was initially processed.

Background_Checks.name: Reference_Number
Background_Checks.description: The ID of the background check associated with this record. This is generated by the third party background check vendor.

Background_Checks.name: Report_Url
Background_Checks.description: Link directly to the background check report provided by your third party background check vendor.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Type_ID
Background_Checks.description: The type of background check that has been requested.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_GUID
Background_Checks.description: The unique identifier used to build a URL to this background check record.

Background_Checks.name: First_Name
Background_Checks.description: The first name of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Middle_Name
Background_Checks.description: The middle name of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Last_Name
Background_Checks.description: The last name of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Maiden_Name
Background_Checks.description: The maiden name of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Date_Of_Birth
Background_Checks.description: The date of birth of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Gender
Background_Checks.description: The gender of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Race
Background_Checks.description: The race of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Address_Line_1
Background_Checks.description: The street name and number of the applicant being background checked

Background_Checks.name: City
Background_Checks.description: The city of the applicant who is being background checked

Background_Checks.name: State
Background_Checks.description: The name of the state of the applicant who is being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Postal_Code
Background_Checks.description: The zip code of the applicant who is being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Digital_Signature
Background_Checks.description: This displays what the applicant typed in for their digital signature.

Background_Checks.name: DL_Number
Background_Checks.description: The drivers license number of the applicant who is being background checked

Background_Checks.name: Jurisdiction
Background_Checks.description: The state the statewide background check was run in.

Background_Checks.name: DL_State
Background_Checks.description: The state the Drivers license is from. Used for the background check integration.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Expires
Background_Checks.description: The date this Background Check expires. Set by a nightly routine based on the Background Check Type. You may manually set a date if an exception is necessary for a particular person’s Background Check.

Background_Checks.name: Background_Check_Status_ID
Background_Checks.description: The status of the Background Check updated by the 3rd party integration.

Background_Checks.name: Status_Date
Background_Checks.description: The time the Status was last updated.

Background_Checks.name: IP_Address
Background_Checks.description: Record of Client IP Address at the time the Background Check was sumbitted.  Required for certain states.

Background_Check_Types.name: Background_Check_Type
Background_Check_Types.description: The kind of background check that was run on an individual.

Background_Check_Types.name: Description
Background_Check_Types.description: A detailed explanation of the type of background check selected

Background_Check_Types.name: Package_Service_Code
Background_Check_Types.description: The type of package purchased through the third party vendor.

Background_Check_Types.name: Collect_DL
Background_Check_Types.description: Indicates whether or not the drivers license number is required to be collected.

Background_Check_Types.name: Collect_State
Background_Check_Types.description: Indicates whether or not the state for which they are running a background check is required to be collected.

Background_Check_Types.name: Collect_Jurisdiction
Background_Check_Types.description: Indicates whether or not the jurisdiction information for which the background check is being run against is required to be collected.

Background_Check_Types.name: Collect_Ethnicity
Background_Check_Types.description: Indicates whether or not the applicants ethnicity is required to be collected.

Background_Check_Types.name: Default_Package
Background_Check_Types.description: The package selected to integrate with your third party background check provider and MP.

Background_Check_Types.name: Is_Background_Check
Background_Check_Types.description: Set this value to false when this type is a DMV, Reference, Credit check, etc. and should not be considered a Background Check.  It will be excluded from the nightly routines, notifications, and fields on the Participants page.

Background_Check_Types.name: Months_Till_Expires
Background_Check_Types.description: An integer value representing the number of months after which a volunteer needs a new Background Check of this type. If NULL, the COMMON,MonthsTillBackgroundCheckExpires value will be used.

Background_Check_Types.name: Expiring_Soon_Days
Background_Check_Types.description: Set the number of days prior to expiration when Qualifications and Compliance should begin displaying 'Expiring Soon'.

dp_Users.name: User_Name
dp_Users.description: A unique value that will identify this user when logging into any MinistryPlatform application or third party application using the API.

dp_Users.name: User_Email
dp_Users.description: DEPRECATED.This value is not used by any MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Display_Name
dp_Users.description: DEPRECATED. This value is not used by any MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Password
dp_Users.description: An encrypted field storing a unique value used in combination with the user name when logging into any MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Admin
dp_Users.description: This setting enables specific features like the ability to "Refresh Cache" in the MinistryPlatform About dialogue.

dp_Users.name: Publications_Manager
dp_Users.description: DEPRECATED. This value is not used in any MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Contact_ID
dp_Users.description: The foreign key to the contact record associated with this user record. User and contact records should be uniquely matched.

dp_Users.name: Supervisor
dp_Users.description: The contact record of the individual to whom the person associated with this user record is accountable. This is used in specific process steps when assigning tasks or securing approval.

dp_Users.name: User_GUID
dp_Users.description: A unique identifier generated by the database for this user record. It is used by specific applications like the Portal for authentication.

dp_Users.name: Can_Impersonate
dp_Users.description: User records where this value is set to TRUE will be able to impersonate other users of the MinistryPlatform core application.

dp_Users.name: In_Recovery
dp_Users.description: DEPRECATED. This value is no longer used by any MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Time_Zone
dp_Users.description: The time zone or "standard time" of the User affecting the date and time displayed. Users can change this setting by clicking their user name in the top right of the Platform.

dp_Users.name: Locale
dp_Users.description: The locale or "culture" of the User affecting the formatting of the date, time, and currency displayed. If blank, the system will use the Domain Locale. Users can change this setting by clicking their user name in the top right of the Platform.

dp_Users.name: Theme
dp_Users.description: This value determines the color scheme and fonts applied to the MinistryPlatform application. Users can change this setting by clicking their user name in the top right of the MinistryPlatform application.

dp_Users.name: Setup_Admin
dp_Users.description: User records where this value is TRUE can view, edit and delete values in the System Setup and System Lookup pages. Edits to these pages impact all users. Improper changes to those pages can potentially take part, or all, of the system offline until corrected.

dp_Users.name: Login_Attempts
dp_Users.description: The number of attempts the User has made to unsuccessfully login. Once the Max Login Attempts value is reached, the User will be locked out.

dp_Users.name: MFA_Required
dp_Users.description: If true, the User will be required to verify via text or email before logging in. If NULL, the Domain MFA setting is used.

Activity_Log.name: Activity_Date
Activity_Log.description: The date when this activity took place. For groups, if set in the Group Type, this date may indicate the individual was active in the group when the activity log was last updated.

Activity_Log.name: Activity_Type
Activity_Log.description: A text value that categorizes the activity recorded. Often this is the page in MinistryPlatform where the activity was recorded.

Activity_Log.name: Record_Name
Activity_Log.description: A text value that distinguishes this activity from other activities of the same type. The event name or group name would be found here for those types of activity.

Activity_Log.name: Contact_ID
Activity_Log.description: The ID number of the contact record for the person who was credited with this activity.

Activity_Log.name: Household_ID
Activity_Log.description: The ID number of the household of the person credited with this activity.

Activity_Log.name: Page_ID
Activity_Log.description: The ID number of the page (table) in MinistryPlatform where this activity was recorded.

Activity_Log.name: Record_ID
Activity_Log.description: The primary key of the record in the database upon which this activity log entry is based.

Activity_Log.name: Table_Name
Activity_Log.description: The name of the database object in which the original record for this activity is located.

Activity_Log.name: Page_Name
Activity_Log.description: The text description of the page in which this activity was recorded in MinistryPlatform.

Activity_Log.name: Congregation_ID
Activity_Log.description: The campus, language group, or venue associated with this activity.

Activity_Log.name: Ministry_ID
Activity_Log.description: The ministry department of the organization associated with this activity.

Ministries.name: Ministry_Name
Ministries.description: The friendly name of the ministry.

Ministries.name: Nickname
Ministries.description: The internal name of this ministry.

Ministries.name: Start_Date
Ministries.description: The date this ministry began to operate.

Ministries.name: End_Date
Ministries.description: The date this ministry ceased to operate.

Ministries.name: Primary_Contact
Ministries.description: The person who oversees and/or would answer questions about this ministry.

Ministries.name: Parent_Ministry
Ministries.description: The ministry that oversees this ministry.

Ministries.name: Available_Online
Ministries.description: If yes, this ministry is an option in Portal drop-down menus.

Ministries.name: Priority_ID
Ministries.description: An internal field that indicates the primary objective this ministry exists to champion.

Ministries.name: Leadership_Team
Ministries.description: An internal field that indicates the primary group/team that oversees this ministry.

Form_Responses.name: Form_ID
Form_Responses.description: The form this response is for.

Form_Responses.name: Response_Date
Form_Responses.description: The date the form response was submitted.

Form_Responses.name: IP_Address
Form_Responses.description: The IP address of the device that submitted this form response.

Form_Responses.name: Contact_ID
Form_Responses.description: The Contact that submitted this form response.

Form_Responses.name: First_Name
Form_Responses.description: The first name provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Last_Name
Form_Responses.description: The last name provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Email_Address
Form_Responses.description: The email address provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Phone_Number
Form_Responses.description: The phone number provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Address_Line_1
Form_Responses.description: The address provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Address_Line_2
Form_Responses.description: The address provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Address_City
Form_Responses.description: The city provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Address_State
Form_Responses.description: The state provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Address_Zip
Form_Responses.description: The zip code provided in the form response.

Form_Responses.name: Event_ID
Form_Responses.description: The event this form response is associated with.

Form_Responses.name: Pledge_Campaign_ID
Form_Responses.description: The pledge campaign this form response is associated with.

Form_Responses.name: Opportunity_ID
Form_Responses.description: The opportunity this form response is for.

Form_Responses.name: Opportunity_Response
Form_Responses.description: The opportunity response this form response is associated with.

Form_Responses.name: Congregation_ID
Form_Responses.description: A value set automatically indicating the congregation associated with this form response. This value is used by the Global Filter for this page.

Form_Responses.name: Notification_Sent
Form_Responses.description: This field will automatically get set to true when a routine sends the response message associated with a stand-alone custom form.

Form_Responses.name: Expires
Form_Responses.description: The date this Form Response expires. Set by a nightly routine based on the Form. You may manually set a date if an exception is necessary for a particular person's Form Response.
